'''hazoyo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zeinoxanthin|zeinoxanthin]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-z-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zeinoxanthin|zeinoxanthin]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| hazoyo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:hæzeyeth|hæzeyeth]] || [[word:hæzeyej|hæzeyej]] || [[word:hæzeyesh|hæzeyesh]] || [[word:hæzeye|hæzeye]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:hazozoyoth|hazozoyoth]] || [[word:hazozoyoj|hazozoyoj]] || [[word:hazozoyosh|hazozoyosh]] || [[word:hazozoyo|hazozoyo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:hazoyoth|hazoyoth]] || [[word:hazoyoj|hazoyoj]] || [[word:hazoyosh|hazoyosh]] || [[word:hazoyo|hazoyo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:hazofyoth|hazofyoth]] || [[word:hazofyoj|hazofyoj]] || [[word:hazofyosh|hazofyosh]] || [[word:hazofyof|hazofyof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hazoyotho|hazoyotho]] || [[word:hazoyojo|hazoyojo]] || [[word:hazoyosho|hazoyosho]] || [[word:hazoyoko|hazoyoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hazoyoth|hazoyoth]] || [[word:hazoyoj|hazoyoj]] || [[word:hazoyosh|hazoyosh]] || [[word:hazoyo|hazoyo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hazoyothol|hazoyothol]] || [[word:hazoyojol|hazoyojol]] || [[word:hazoyoshol|hazoyoshol]] || [[word:hazoyokol|hazoyokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hazoyothotho|hazoyothotho]] || [[word:hazoyojojo|hazoyojojo]] || [[word:hazoyoshosho|hazoyoshosho]] || [[word:hazoyoko|hazoyoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hazoyothon|hazoyothon]] || [[word:hazoyojon|hazoyojon]] || [[word:hazoyoshon|hazoyoshon]] || [[word:hazoyokon|hazoyokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hazoyothoro|hazoyothoro]] || [[word:hazoyojoro|hazoyojoro]] || [[word:hazoyoshoro|hazoyoshoro]] || [[word:hazoyokoro|hazoyokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a249b1f}}
